briefdescription.para: Specifies the alignment requirement of the declared object or member.

detaileddescription.para: Yields the alignment requirement of its operand type.

briefdescription.para: A function declared with a _Noreturn function specifier SHALL not return to its caller.
An object whose identifier is declared with the storage-class specifier _Thread_local has thread storage duration.

detaileddescription.para: Its lifetime is the entire execution of the thread for which it is created, and its stored value is initialized when the thread is started. There is a distinct object per thread, and use of the declared name in an expression refers to the object associated with the thread evaluating the expression.

briefdescription.para: The number of bits in a long.
The presumed size (in bytes) of a line in the L1 data cache.

detaileddescription.para: This value can be used with _Alignas() to prevent variables from sharing a cache line, which may increase the performance of some data structures in a multithreaded environment.

briefdescription.para: The maximum size (in bytes) of stack-allocated arrays.
This header file is part of the C11 and POSIX compatibility library; it contains the compiler feature definitions.

detaileddescription.para:
